sections.paragraph:
Original: קצין

Transliteration: qâtsı̂yn

Phonetic: kaw-tseen'

BDB Definition:

  1. chief, ruler, commander
    1. chief, commander (in war)
    2. dictator
    3. ruler (of one in authority)

Origin: from H7096 in the sense of determining

TWOT entry: 2054a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
